user_query: Change childs third day, second breakfast option to spagetti with maple syrup

updated_paths: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Child > Day 3 > Breakfast > Avocado Toast — Garlic-Ginger Combo

update_results.path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Child > Day 3 > Breakfast > Avocado Toast — Garlic-Ginger Combo

nutrition_note.from: Well-balanced morning option with fiber from whole-grain bread, heart-healthy fats from avocado, and protein from egg. Lemon adds vitamin C; this combo provides steady energy and satiety. Note: garlic/ginger are not included in the listed ingredients.
nutrition_note.to: This is a high-carbohydrate, higher-sugar breakfast option because of the maple syrup. Provides quick energy from simple sugars and carbohydrates from pasta but is low in protein and fiber unless paired with additional items (e.g., yogurt, nuts, or fruit). Best served occasionally or combined with a protein source for a more balanced meal.

meal_suggestion.from: Toast the bread, mash avocado and spread on top, add a cooked egg, and finish with a squeeze of lemon and a dash of pepper. Optional flavor tweaks include adding garlic, ginger, or chili flakes if you like.
meal_suggestion.to: Cook spaghetti according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and return to the pot. Toss with a small pat of butter (optional) and a drizzle of pure maple syrup. Serve warm; optionally top with a sprinkle of cinnamon or a few sliced bananas for added flavor.

short_description.from: Avocado toast on whole-grain bread topped with egg and a lemon finish.
